text.title: PR Time + Cost Diff Tool Examples
text.summary: One worked example: a "tiny prompt tweak" PR that doubles tokens and is caught by the checker.

example.description: PR #482 adds 3 paragraphs of "be careful" instructions to a system prompt. Checker replays eval set; reports +180ms p95 latency and +120% $/req. Verdict: fail.
example.code: { "pr_number": 482, "base_sha": "a1b2c3d", "head_sha": "e4f5a6b", "eval_set_hash": "1234567", "cost_table_version": "2026.05.20", "deltas": { "median_latency_ms": 40, "p95_latency_ms": 180, "usd_per_req_cents": 1.2, "eval_pass_rate_pct": 0.1 }, "verdict": "fail", "budget_breach_reasons": [ "usd_per_req_cents delta +120% exceeds +20% budget", "p95_latency_ms delta +180ms exceeds +30% threshold (baseline 400ms)" ] }

example.description: PR-comment markdown rendered from the report.
example.code:
## Cost + Time Diff (vs main)
| metric | base | head | delta | |---|---|---|---| | median latency | 320ms | 360ms | +40ms | | p95 latency | 400ms | 580ms | +180ms | | $/req | 1.0¢ | 2.2¢ | +1.2¢ (+120%) | | eval pass-rate | 91.3% | 91.4% | +0.1pp |
Verdict: **fail** — usd_per_req delta exceeds +20% budget. Merge blocked.
